<div align="center" dir="auto">
  <a href="https://github.com/safaritrader/lightweight-chart-plugin">
    <img width="1000" src="https://github.com/safaritrader/lightweight-chart-plugin/raw/main/src/lightweight-chart-plugin.jpg" style="max-width: 100%;">
  </a>
  <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">TradingView Lightweight Charts™ Plugin (LCP)</h1><a id="user-content-tradingview-lightweight-charts-plugin-lcp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: TradingView Lightweight Charts™ Plugin (LCP)" href="#tradingview-lightweight-charts-plugin-lcp"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
</div>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/tradingview/lightweight-charts"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/a3dc3ccf812cb6958fb8323c82f73d012680e35f853989c88fe7cab688dadfbf/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f54726164696e67766965775f4c696768745765696768745f43686172742d342e322e302d626c7565263f636f6c6f723d726564" alt=" License" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Tradingview_LightWeight_Chart-4.2.0-blue&?color=red" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
<a href="https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/b29cff648f8c0fa6ec342d61f6718bfaf61e778f70c720aee9e69bff5fff82ba/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4c43502d312e302e302d626c7565263f636f6c6f723d726564" alt="MIT License" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LCP-1.0.0-blue&?color=red" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<p dir="auto">Elevate your financial charts with custom overlays, interactive tooltips, and dynamic volume profiles. The Lightweight Chart Plugin extends the <a href="https://github.com/tradingview/lightweight-charts/">Lightweight Charts library</a>, offering powerful features for advanced data visualization and user interaction.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🎉 Features</h2><a id="user-content--features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🎉 Features" href="#-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>✨ Custom Overlays</strong>: Draw rectangles, circles, and vertical session markers directly on your charts.</li>
<li><strong>💬 Interactive Tooltips</strong>: Display rich, informative tooltips upon user interaction.</li>
<li><strong>📈 Volume Profiles</strong>: Visualize volume distribution across different price levels with ease.</li>
<li><strong>🔧 Flexible Configuration</strong>: Tailor every aspect of the plugin to fit your specific needs.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🚀 Getting Started</h2><a id="user-content--getting-started" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🚀 Getting Started" href="#-getting-started"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Installation</strong>
CDN</p>
<p dir="auto">You can use <a href="https://unpkg.com" rel="nofollow">unpkg</a>:</p>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://unpkg.com/lightweight-chart-plugin@1.0.0/dist/lightweight-chart-plugin.js" rel="nofollow">https://unpkg.com/lightweight-chart-plugin@1.0.0/dist/lightweight-chart-plugin.js</a></p>
<p dir="auto">or include it directly in your HTML:</p>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Quick Example</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-v">LightweightCharts</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">createChart</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-smi">document</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">getElementById</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">'chart'</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">series</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">addCandlestickSeries</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">lcp</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">LighweightChartPlugin</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//Pass The Chart</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">chart</span>: <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//Pass CandleStick Series</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">series</span>: <span class="pl-s1">series</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-c">//Add Rectangle</span>
<span class="pl-s1">lcp</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">addRectangle</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">time1</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 10:02'</span> <span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">price1</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">103</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">time2</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 14:32'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">price2</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">105</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">color</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'rgba(255,1,73,0.70)'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">useGradient</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">tooltipText</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">'Sell Label Not Triggered'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">triggered</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-c">//Add Circle</span>
<span class="pl-s1">lcp</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">addCircle</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">time</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 10:03'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">price</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">color</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">'rgba(255,2,2,0.5)'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">useGradient</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">tooltipText</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'Circle Sell location_ High'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">location_</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'high'</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-c">//Add Session </span>
<span class="pl-s1">lcp</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">addSession</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">time</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 10:25'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">color</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">'rgba(8,255,178,0.27)'</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">let</span> <span class="pl-s1">volume_data</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">time</span>: <span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 10:00'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">price</span>: <span class="pl-c1">100</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">volume</span>:<span class="pl-c1">5</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">time</span>: <span class="pl-s">'2023-04-13 10:01'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">price</span>: <span class="pl-c1">101</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">volume</span>:<span class="pl-c1">5</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span>
<span class="pl-s1">volume_data</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">forEach</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">vol</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//Add Volume Profile</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">lcp</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">addVolume</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">vol</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">time</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-s1">vol</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">price</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-s1">vol</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">volume</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Add a ❏Rectangle overlay to the chart.</strong></p>

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>color</td>

</tr>

</tr>
